title: ANC - Change Transparency Mode value (Environment/Speech)
scenario: Transparency Mode Environment/Speech setting does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure an ANC-supported device is connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → ANC.
3. In the ANC tab, change the Transparency Mode value to "Environment".
4. Close the ANC tab by navigating back to Device Settings.
5. Reopen the ANC tab by going to Device Settings → ANC.
6. Observe the Transparency Mode value displayed.
7. Repeat steps 2–6, this time changing the Transparency Mode value to "Speech" in step 3.
expected: The Transparency Mode value (Environment or Speech) selected in step 3 is retained and displayed correctly after reopening the ANC tab in step 5, for both values tested.
